match_nodes.description: CSA CCM Mapping Methodology: process for mapping the Cloud Controls Matrix to other security frameworks and standards. Defines how CCM controls relate to controls in frameworks like NIST 800-53, ISO 27001, and others.

CSA Incident-to-Control Mapping Methodology: process for analyzing security incidents to identify which controls would have prevented or detected them. Draft methodology — namespace claimed for future development.

CSA Control-to-Capability Mapping Methodology: process for mapping abstract control requirements to concrete product security capabilities. Bridges the gap between 'what must be done' (controls) and 'what can be done' (capabilities). Draft methodology — namespace claimed for future development.
